expression: Top''/Bottom Board: {([Width]) - 2 * ([BoardThick])} x {([Depth])-([BackBoardThick])} x {[BoardThick]} x 2pcs & Side Board: {([Height])} x {([Depth])-([BackBoardThick])} x {[BoardThick]} x 2pcs & Back Board: {([Width])} x {([Height])} x {([BackBoardThick])} x 1pcs
author: sheenhoong

remarks.zh: 计算橱柜的板材尺寸。[宽度], [高度], [深度] 表示总测量值，[板材厚度] 是顶部、底部和侧板的材料厚度，[背景板厚度] 是背景板的厚度。(AI translated, please check)
remarks.en: Calculates board sizes for a cabinet. [Width], [Height],[Depth] is total Measurement, [BoardThick] is Top, Bottom and Side Board material thickness, [BackBoardThick] is Background Board material thickness.
remarks.ms: Mengira saiz papan untuk kabinet. [Width], [Height], [Depth] ialah ukuran keseluruhan, [BoardThick] adalah ketebalan bahan untuk papan atas, bawah dan sisi, [BackBoardThick] adalah ketebalan bahan untuk papan belakang. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.id: Menghitung ukuran papan untuk kabinet. [Width], [Height], [Depth] adalah pengukuran total, [BoardThick] adalah ketebalan material papan atas, bawah, dan samping, [BackBoardThick] adalah ketebalan bahan papan belakang. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.th: คำนวณขนาดแผ่นไม้สำหรับตู้ [Width], [Height], [Depth] คือขนาดรวม [BoardThick] คือความหนาของวัสดุแผ่นบน ล่าง และด้านข้าง [BackBoardThick] คือความหนาของแผ่นหลัง (AI translated, please check)
remarks.vi: Tính toán kích thước ván cho tủ. [Width], [Height], [Depth] là tổng kích thước, [BoardThick] là độ dày vật liệu của ván trên, dưới và bên hông, [BackBoardThick] là độ dày vật liệu của ván sau. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.tl: Kinakalkula ang mga sukat ng board para sa kabinet. [Width], [Height], [Depth] ang kabuuang Sukat, [BoardThick] ay kapal ng materyales para sa itaas, ibaba at gilid na mga board, [BackBoardThick] ay kapal ng materyales sa likod na board. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.my: ကက်ဘိနက်အတွက်သင့် Board သိရဉ်း Modified(append details end AI.Translate implemented tags!!). (AI translated, please check)
